ordinanceLabel: Ord. 65.155 (2025 CBC adoption) | Ord. 65.144 (Streamlined Solar) | All-Electric Mandate (City Council Jan 17, 2023)
fireAgency: Milpitas Fire Department — Bureau of Fire Prevention (city-operated, plan check via Building Dept One-Stop Center)
